decisions.summary: Create findVBriefInPrdDirs helper in vbrief/io.ts to search docs/prds/planned/, docs/prds/active/, api/docs/prds/planned/, api/docs/prds/active/ for .vbrief.json files matching an issue ID.

hazards.summary: PRD dir paths may not exist in all project structures
hazards.mitigation: Use existsSync checks and graceful fallbacks

resumePoint.description: Implement bead workspace-d5qf: add findVBriefInPrdDirs helper to src/lib/vbrief/io.ts. Then integrate into CLI start.ts and dashboard agents.ts.

sessionHistory.note: Started PAN-945 implementation. Rebased onto main, removed stale continue.json, created beads.
